# Assessment Overview

This directory contains supplementary assessment fact documents generated during analysis.

## Available Documents

- [architecture-diagram.md](./architecture-diagram.md) - High-level application and component relationship diagrams.
- [dependency-map.md](./dependency-map.md) - External dependency categories, versions, and compatibility notes.
- [api-service-contracts.md](./api-service-contracts.md) - Service catalog, endpoint contracts, and communication sequence.
- [data-architecture.md](./data-architecture.md) - Database, entities, repository patterns, and data boundaries.
- [configuration-inventory.md](./configuration-inventory.md) - Profiles, settings sources, secrets workflow, and runtime versions.
- [business-workflows.md](./business-workflows.md) - Core business workflows, domain mapping, and decision logic.
